prompt: I want to add schema validation to my processor pipeline. If a document doesn't match the expected schema, I want the processor to reject it with an error.

assertions.name: uses_dlq_not_error
assertions.reason: validationAction: 'error' crashes the entire processor on the first invalid document

assertions.name: explains_error_crashes
assertions.description: Explains that validationAction: 'error' will crash the processor

assertions.name: corrects_user_request
assertions.description: Corrects the user's request to 'reject with an error' by explaining why 'dlq' is the safe choice

common_mistakes.error: The FIRST invalid document immediately stops the processor with an unrecoverable error
common_mistakes.fix: Use validationAction: 'dlq' — invalid documents are routed to the dead letter queue while valid ones continue processing

common_mistakes.error: $validate requires a validator object with a $jsonSchema schema
common_mistakes.fix: Always include validator: {$jsonSchema: {...}} in the $validate stage

skill_reference: SKILL.md: '$validate with validationAction: "error" — crashes processor; use "dlq" instead'
